blocking_export_risks: Curve action objects need Roblox-compatible Beam, Attachment, or MeshPart conversion.
Small marker meshes should be grouped or instanced for runtime performance.
Emission and transparency need Studio validation.
recommended_roblox_plan: Export GeneDynamics as an optional action layer under Nucleus_Model/GeneDynamics.
Represent MRNA_ExportPath_ToPore as Beams between Attachments where possible.
Keep ActiveGene_Locus and PoreExport_CheckpointState as stable named runtime targets.
